mapper.insert: INSERT INTO event_outbox (topic, message_key, payload, status, retry_count, next_retry_time, created_at, updated_at, last_error) VALUES (#{topic}, #{messageKey}, #{payload}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{nextRetryTime}, NOW(), NOW(), #{lastError})
mapper.update: UPDATE event_outbox SET status = 2, next_retry_time = #{lockUntil}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN (0, 2)
UPDATE event_outbox SET status = #{status}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime}, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, topic, message_key as messageKey, payload, status, retry_count as retryCount, next_retry_time as nextRetryTime, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, last_error as lastError FROM event_outbox WHERE status IN (0, 2) AND next_retry_time <= #{now} ORDER BY id LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update:
UPDATE event_outbox SET status = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
